_meta.description: Overnight coding/research agent that calls model providers, sandboxes, and secret-backed tools (GitHub/Vercel/staging DB). Budgets are accounting caps over the dev's own rails — Sanction holds no money (control-plane, FUND-1 = no custody).

enforcement.policy.blockedCategories: ENFORCED — authorize denies on exact category match
enforcement.policy.allowedCategories: NOT YET ENFORCED — authorize only checks blockedCategories; allowlist is documentation of intent until UX-3
enforcement.policy.autoApproveUnderUsd: NOT YET WIRED — present in schema; authorize auto-approves anything within budget and at/under escalateOverUsd
enforcement.clearance: MODELED ONLY — AgentClearance is not yet enforced and has no assignment endpoint (NEXT phase)
enforcement.vault: ENFORCED — exec issues scoped 15-min JWT; inject checks scope + expiry + audit-logs

_meta.apply: No policy-management API exists yet (POST /wallets creates defaults only). Until a PATCH /wallets/:id/policy endpoint ships (UX-3), set these values directly in the Policy row. See README.md.
